widgets_values:

## Model links (for local users)

**diffusion_models**

- [flux-2-klein-base-9b-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-base-9b-fp8)

> Please visit BFL's repo, accept the agreement in the repo, and then download the fp8 model.

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein-9B/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors)

**vae**

- [flux2-vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── flux2-vae.safetensors
```
## Report issue

Note: please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/zh-CN/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud ship stable builds; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the next stable release.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

The man has a focused, intense, and slightly defiant facial expression.

Key features:
- His eyes are wide open and staring directly at the camera with an unblinking gaze.
- His eyebrows are raised slightly, contributing to an alert or challenging look.
- His mouth is set in a firm line; it's not smiling but rather held tight, suggesting concentration or determination.
- There’s visible tension around his jawline and cheekbones, indicating he's exerting effort while skateboarding.
- A cigarette rests between his lips, adding a casual yet rebellious element to his demeanor.

Overall, this isn't a relaxed or happy expression—it conveys energy, focus, and perhaps a bit of edgy confidence as he rides down the street. The direct eye contact creates a sense of connection and intensity with the viewer.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode ( Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: bad quality, noise, blurry, worst quality, low resolution, blur, distortion, unnatural blending, cartoon, illustration, painting

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
head_swap: start with Picture 1 as the base image, keeping its lighting, environment, and background. remove the head from Picture 1 completely and replace it with the head from Picture 2, strictly preserving the hair, eye color, nose structure of Picture 2. copy the direction of the eye, head rotation, micro expressions from Picture 1, high quality, sharp details, 4k.

Describe the expression in Picture 1 and copy it to the new image.

head_swap: start with Picture 1 as the base image, keeping its lighting, environment, and background. remove the head from Picture 1 completely and replace it with the head from Picture 2, strictly preserving the hair, eye color, nose structure of Picture 2. copy the direction of the eye, head rotation, micro expressions from Picture 1, high quality, sharp details, 4k
